introSection: FunCoaster is a steel spinning wild mouse roller coaster located at Funplex Mount Laurel in Mount Laurel, New Jersey, USA. It opened on March 30, 2013.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: Single car trains. Riders are arranged 4 across in a single row for a total of 4 riders per car.

fullText:
FunCoaster is a steel spinning wild mouse roller coaster located at Funplex Mount Laurel in Mount Laurel, New Jersey, USA. It opened on March 30, 2013.



Single car trains. Riders are arranged 4 across in a single row for a total of 4 riders per car.
